# HUY HUY COFFEE — Copilot Instructions

## Project

HUY HUY COFFEE is a premium specialty coffee brand.

Every implementation must follow the MASTER BOOK.

Never redesign unless explicitly requested.

---

## Tech Stack

- Next.js App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Turborepo
- pnpm

---

## Architecture

apps/web

packages/ui

packages/content

packages/types

packages/utils

packages/design-tokens

packages/config

packages/hooks

packages/icons

packages/knowledge

---

## Code Style

- Prefer reusable components.
- Use semantic HTML.
- Keep components small.
- Use TypeScript everywhere.
- Prefer server components unless interactivity is required.
- Use Next Image.
- Use Next Link.
- Avoid duplicated code.

---

## Design Rules

Premium.

Minimal.

Elegant.

Large whitespace.

Warm palette.

Rounded corners.

Subtle animations.

Responsive first.

Accessibility required.

---

## Content Rules

Never invent marketing copy.

Use existing content from the MASTER BOOK.

If content is missing:

STOP

and ask before creating it.

---

## Git Rules

Never commit automatically.

Never push automatically.

Never create pull requests automatically.

Only modify local files.

---

## Build Rules

One BUILD = one feature.

Never implement more than requested.

Stop after completing the BUILD.
